$comment: Machine-readable policy for the paperclip-checker App gate. Loaded from the TRUSTED base branch only. `appSlug` is the checker's OWN bot identity, used for separation-of-duties: the App can never approve a PR it authored, pushed, or committed. The real GitHub App is 'solidus-paperclip-checker' (App ID 4372695), so its bot login is 'solidus-paperclip-checker[bot]'. Each required check is bound to its expected producing app so a same-named check-run/status from any other app cannot satisfy the gate. github-actions is app id 15368 (slug 'github-actions'); both required checks are produced by GitHub Actions jobs (verify from workflow 'PR', gitleaks from workflow 'Secret Scan'). `appCheckName` is the App-authored required Check Run the gate publishes on the exact PR head (success == merge-eligible); it is the enforceable merge signal because an App review has author-association NONE and cannot satisfy required_approving_review_count. See doc/PAPERCLIP-CHECKER.md.
